raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has had a devastating impact on our economy and the state budget.",
    "K-12 public schools impact all of our communities -- urban, suburban, and rural.",
    "The state needs to give our schools more resources at a time when they are facing increased costs due to the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "We cannot fully reopen our economy without reopening our schools.",
    "Many Californians cannot get back to work without our schools reopening.",
    "The pandemic has underscored the role of schools in providing childcare, meals, and mental health services.",
    "There is a need to fully fund the Local Control Funding Formula (LCFF) at least at the 2019-20 funding level.",
    "Federal CARES Act funding should be distributed in a fair and equitable way to all school districts.",
    "The overriding purpose of the CARES Act funding is to address the impact of the pandemic.",
    "Federal CARES Act dollars should be distributed to help all schools provide necessary services and equipment."
  ]
}
```
